description.p: When below half of your maximum hit points, you gain advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws.

sheet.description: While below half your maximum hit points, you have advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws.

description.p: Once per long rest, you can cast an Abjuration or Restoration spell that you don't have prepared. This costs a spell slot as usual.

sheet.description: Cast one unprepared Abjuration or Restoration spell, expending a spell slot as normal.
